Pixel Frens is a 10,000 piece art collection of cute and chaotic frens on Ethereum. 
With +125 skins and over 2,000 traits, every fren brings its own unique vibe. Some being cute, some goofy, some crazy or even a little fiery. 
Theres a perfect fren for everyone!
